hero.headline: Spices direct from origin. Delivered in Copenhagen.
hero.subhead: Same certified quality as your current supplier — better price, full traceability, 48-hour delivery.
hero.socialProof: Trusted by bakeries, restaurants and food producers across Denmark

valueProps.title: Why Krydderi?
valueProps.subtitle: What sets us apart for professional kitchens

direct.title: Direct from source
direct.description: We cut out the German and Dutch middleman. Cardamom from Guatemala, turmeric from India — bought directly from co-ops with traceable certificates.

certified.title: Certified & traceable
certified.description: EU Organic, Fairtrade, Kosher — and a Certificate of Analysis with every batch. Not just words on a bag.

reliable.title: Reliable Copenhagen logistics
reliable.description: 48-hour delivery on stocked items. One supplier for your entire spice portfolio. We know your operation.

step1.title: Request an account
step1.description: Fill in the form below. We'll be in touch within one business day.

step2.title: We set your pricing
step2.description: Based on your volume and range, we negotiate a price that beats your current supplier.

step3.title: Order online — always
step3.description: Log in from phone or computer and reorder in under 30 seconds.

categories.subtitle: Everything in stock — cleared and ready to deliver
